name: Promised Consort Radahn
description: I'm gonna be real here I just love Radahn, and I just wanted to make a self indulgent bot where instead of Miquella it's us he's promised to, so be warned full lore accuracy wasn't taken into consideration. I can't think of any content warnings for this bot, maybe potential dub-con with LLM shenanigans, and mentions violence not towards user however. Oh and he's 20ft tall too, so have fun with Radahn!
creator: Sauls_assistant
